title: fumaria capitata
intro: Fumaria capitata, also known as Fumitory or Capitate Fumitory, is a plant species belonging to the Fumariaceae family and is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fumaria capitata include its ability to treat conditions such as rheumatism, skin issues, and digestive problems. Fumaria capitata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
